title: BoundaryUse
description: Records a raw-tool bypass invocation (agency/capabilities/dogfood/_main.py; Spec 195). Captured by the stop-hook to surface 'should have called a capability verb' patterns. RECORDED_BY edge links to the originating Event.

argument_summary.description: Trimmed summary of the tool arguments (never the full payload).

target.description: Full path or command passed to the tool.

verb_shadow.description: The capability verb that should have served the same intent.

intent_id.description: The Intent node this invocation was serving.

session.description: Session identifier linking to a SessionLifecycle node.
